mapper.select:
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(amount), 0) FROM bill_record WHERE bill_type = 1 AND DATE(bill_time) = CURDATE()
AND user_id = #{userId}

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(amount), 0) FROM bill_record WHERE bill_type = 2 AND DATE(bill_time) = CURDATE()
AND user_id = #{userId}

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(amount), 0) FROM bill_record WHERE bill_type = 1
AND user_id = #{userId}

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(amount), 0) FROM bill_record WHERE bill_type = 2
AND user_id = #{userId}
